scan_metadata.mission: COMMERCIAL MISSION TASK 3 — Marketplace Demand Signal Scan
scan_metadata.methodology: WebSearch intelligence gathering across 8 targeted queries

market_context.dominant_trend: Specificity wins — niche tools outperform generic ones in 2025–2026
market_context.hottest_category_product_hunt: AI agents with domain expertise (13 of top 15 PH products in 2025 were AI-tagged)

platform_recommendation.saas_subscriptions: LemonSqueezy (5%+50¢ fee, native subscriptions, VAT handling)

top_3_demand_gaps.gap_title: US Stock Dividend & Tax-Lot Tracker (Google Sheets / Excel)
top_3_demand_gaps.problem_statement: Retail investors tracking US stock dividends, qualified vs ordinary income, and wash sale rules have limited polished, affordable templates on Gumroad or digital marketplaces. Generic budgeting templates are saturated; US tax-aware dividend tools with wash sale tracking are virtually non-existent despite 60M+ active US retail investors.
what_buyers_are_asking_for: Dividend income tracker across multiple US brokerage accounts
Qualified vs ordinary dividend classification for tax optimization
Wash sale rule detector for active traders
DRIP reinvestment tracker with cost basis calculations
Forecast tool: projected annual income from dividend portfolio with tax impact
evidence_of_demand: US dividend investing communities (r/dividends, r/investing) have 5M+ combined members
Spreadsheet template category validated — sellers documenting $3K-5K/month from niche finance templates
No affordable wash-sale-aware dividend tracker exists on Gumroad or LemonSqueezy
TurboTax and H&R Block users actively seeking supplemental tracking tools for investment income
top_3_demand_gaps.competition_level: Low — generic dividend trackers exist; tax-aware US-specific tools with wash sale logic are absent
top_3_demand_gaps.estimated_market_size: 60M+ US retail investors; ~15M active dividend investors. Targeting 0.01% capture = 1,500 sales = $43,500 revenue at $29
top_3_demand_gaps.build_complexity: LOW — Google Sheets with GOOGLEFINANCE formulas, tax classification logic, clean UI
top_3_demand_gaps.market_focus: US retail investors and dividend income earners

top_3_demand_gaps.gap_title: AI Agent Workflow Blueprints for US Finance/Trading Automation (n8n / Make.com)
top_3_demand_gaps.problem_statement: AI agent toolkits are the #1 category on Product Hunt in 2026, but almost nothing targets US financial workflows — SEC filing alerts, earnings report parsing, portfolio rebalancing triggers. Generic n8n/Make templates exist but finance-specific blueprints with real US market trading logic are absent from all marketplaces.
what_buyers_are_asking_for: n8n workflow: monitor SEC EDGAR filings → filter by ticker/type → push Slack/Discord alert
Make.com blueprint: earnings surprise detector (beat/miss vs consensus) → automated trade alert
AI agent that summarises 10-K/10-Q filings and rates risk factor changes 1–10
Automated portfolio rebalance calculator triggered by price thresholds on US stocks
Weekly market digest generator using Claude/GPT → email delivery for US market movers
evidence_of_demand: 13 of top 15 Product Hunt products in 2025 were AI-tagged — agent toolkits are a proven category
Sagehood and similar AI stock analysis tools gained traction on PH — demand validated
n8n self-hosted automation trending strongly among US developers in 2025–2026
Workflow automation guides rank as high-demand/lower-saturation on Gumroad (2025 research)
Merchants using AI-automated delivery report 40% higher customer retention (LemonSqueezy data)
top_3_demand_gaps.competition_level: LOW — generic automation templates exist; US finance-specific AI agent blueprints are sparse
top_3_demand_gaps.estimated_market_size: Global developer/indie trader market; US finance automation is a $2B+ niche. Conservative: 500 units at $39 = $19,500 in first 90 days
top_3_demand_gaps.build_complexity: MEDIUM — requires building and testing actual n8n/Make flows with real US data sources
top_3_demand_gaps.platform: Gumroad (one-off) + LemonSqueezy (subscription tier for new workflows monthly)
top_3_demand_gaps.market_focus: US retail investors, quant traders, and fintech developers

top_3_demand_gaps.gap_title: US Small Business Template Toolkit — Proposals, SOWs & Invoices (Notion / Google Docs)
top_3_demand_gaps.problem_statement: US small businesses and freelancers spend hours creating proposals, statements of work, and invoices from scratch. While generic templates exist, there is no comprehensive US-focused toolkit that includes state sales tax tables, W-9 collection workflows, 1099 contractor tracking, and net-30/60/90 payment term automation. This is a low-build, high-margin digital product gap.
what_buyers_are_asking_for: Professional proposal template with US-standard terms and conditions
SOW template with milestone-based payment schedules
Invoice template with automatic state sales tax calculation
1099 contractor tracking spreadsheet for year-end filing
Client onboarding checklist with W-9 collection workflow
evidence_of_demand: r/freelance and r/smallbusiness frequently request US-specific business document templates
Notion template marketplace shows strong demand for business operations bundles ($29-79 price point)
US freelancer population: 73.3M (2024 Upwork study) — massive addressable market
Gumroad sellers report $2K-8K/month from niche business template packs
IRS 1099 reporting changes in 2026 creating fresh demand for contractor tracking tools

current_price_points.premium_bundle: $79 (full toolkit: 12 templates + video setup guide + state tax table)

top_3_demand_gaps.competition_level: MEDIUM — generic templates exist; US tax-aware business toolkits with 1099/W-9 workflows are rare
top_3_demand_gaps.estimated_market_size: 73.3M US freelancers + 33.2M US small businesses. Conservative: 800 units at $39 = $31,200 in first 90 days
top_3_demand_gaps.build_complexity: LOW — Notion templates + Google Sheets, no code required
top_3_demand_gaps.market_focus: US freelancers, solopreneurs, and small business owners

emerging_winners_to_watch: Skill Sprint micro-courses ($10–$49, single specific outcome)
AI agent builder templates for specific industries
US tax-aware finance tools (significant gap in affordable tier)

platform_landscape.gumroad: 18,367 stores, strong discovery engine, 10% fee — best for one-off digital products
platform_landscape.lemonsqueezy: Better for SaaS/subscriptions, 5%+50¢ fee, VAT-compliant — best for recurring products
platform_landscape.rapidapi: 18 finance APIs visible in top results; affordable US-focused APIs growing fast
platform_landscape.product_hunt: AI agents are #1 category; finance-specific agents are a clear gap

recommendation_priority.fastest_to_revenue: Gap #1 — US Stock Dividend & Tax-Lot Tracker (3–5 day build, low competition, clear buyer)
recommendation_priority.highest_ceiling: Gap #2 — AI Finance Workflow Blueprints (recurring revenue, global market, rides the AI agent wave)
recommendation_priority.best_risk_reward: Gap #3 — US Small Business Template Toolkit (lowest build effort, huge addressable market, proven Gumroad category)
